rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses And For Monetary Sanctions From Defendant Viviane Sosa; Declararion Of Attorney Daniel D. Murphy In Suuport' P & A
rulings.Rulings: Plaintiff Raoul Sosa's motion to compel further responses to form interrogatories is granted. Defendant is ordered to provide further verified responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Responses must state facts, not just conclusions, and shall identify documents with particularity. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. = (610/BEC)
